engineeringPackage.title: Electrical Engineering Design and Study Package
designNotes: This package is a software demonstration, not a sealed engineering deliverable.
Series-connected fuse curves are represented by screening envelopes for report demonstration; manufacturer-published minimum-melt and total-clearing data remains required for final design.
Arc-flash results require field-verified enclosure and electrode data before operational use.
Raceway cross-sections are schematic and must be coordinated with civil and structural drawings.

trayCrossSections.separationNote: Single-layer power arrangement shown; maintain project segregation requirements.
Production motor feeders shown in a single layer with space reserved for future circuits.
VFD input and output cables shown; maintain manufacturer-recommended EMC separation and grounding.
